; Mitchell Scott (https://github.com/rmitchellscott)
; SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
; Modified: 2026-03-15T14:54:21Z

; Add touchLocked property and toolbar button
AFFECT [[11313888899523275277]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]#[[6504254477]]
        LOCATE BEFORE ALL
        INSERT {
            property bool touchLocked: ~&214625660372&~
        }

        TRAVERSE [[6502786168]]#[[233745975898428]] > [[8398044571386570029]]
            LOCATE BEFORE [[7712155293725601]][.[[8399878573055752961]]=[["3575461827597527778]]]
            INSERT {
                ~&454089850271038938&~ {
                    ~&5972374&~: touchLockButton
                    ~&233745975898428&~: ~&6504254477&~
                    ~&6504337259&~: ~&454089850271038938&~.~&6503187275&~.~&14888501028015932088&~

                    ~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&6504254477&~.touchLocked ? ~&"6968812141881670766&~ : ~&"6500189676555423554&~
                    ~&233726547792244&~: ~&6504329801&~
                    ~&233748328658231&~: !!~&7712934851008712&~ && ~&6504254477&~.~&7712989577739634&~ && ~&6504254477&~.~&4367731859579753176&~ > 7
                    ~&214641332312&~: !!~&7712934851008712&~ && ~&6504254477&~.~&4367731859579753176&~ > 7

                    ~&254542253295368380&~: {
                        ~&6504254477&~.touchLocked = !~&6504254477&~.touchLocked;
                    }
                }
            }
        END TRAVERSE
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

; Settings menu entry when toolbar is cramped (portrait)
AFFECT [[11704595946725378272]]
    TRAVERSE [[454089850271038938]]#[[6504254477]] > [[254480451320573660]]#[[16710723433319324941]] > [[14125623155555875541]]#[[233724020048228]]
        LOCATE AFTER [[425121728314878811.15740235808997988493]]
        INSERT {
            ~&425121728314878811&~.~&432643201877711221&~ {
                ~&214632764553&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.touchLocked ? ~&6504222003&~("Unlock Touch") : ~&6504222003&~("Lock Touch")
                ~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.touchLocked ? ~&"6968812141881670766&~ : ~&"6500189676555423554&~
                ~&233748328658231&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.~&4367731859579753176&~ <= 7 &&
                         ~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.~&14953652214069020552&~.~&14593461789319363686&~
                ~&254542236275632405&~: {
                    ~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.touchLocked = !~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.touchLocked;
                    ~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.~&15738511857451076348&~();
                }
            }

            ~&425121728314878811&~.~&15740235808997988493&~ {
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                ~&233748328658231&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.~&4367731859579753176&~ <= 7 &&
                         ~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.~&14953652214069020552&~.~&14593461789319363686&~
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

; More Tools menu entry when toolbar is cramped (landscape)
AFFECT [[6025599999262907645]]
    TRAVERSE [[454089850271038938]]#[[6504254477]]
        TRAVERSE [[14125623155555875541]]
            LOCATE AFTER ALL
            INSERT {
                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&15740235808997988493&~ {
                    ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                    ~&233748328658231&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.~&4367731859579753176&~ <= 7 &&
                             !~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.~&14953652214069020552&~.~&14593461789319363686&~
                }

                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&432643201877711221&~ {
                    ~&214632764553&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.touchLocked ? ~&6504222003&~("Unlock Touch") : ~&6504222003&~("Lock Touch")
                    ~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.touchLocked ? ~&"6968812141881670766&~ : ~&"6500189676555423554&~
                    ~&233748328658231&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.~&4367731859579753176&~ <= 7 &&
                             !~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.~&14953652214069020552&~.~&14593461789319363686&~
                    ~&254542236275632405&~: {
                        ~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.touchLocked = !~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.touchLocked;
                        ~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.~&15738511857451076348&~();
                    }
                }
            }
        END TRAVERSE
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

; Touch-blocking area and reset on close
AFFECT [[1224665461898798997]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]#[[6504254477]] > [[6502786168]]#[[15549782143769420265]]
        LOCATE BEFORE [[233704648923420]]
        INSERT {
            ~&5829722763406825114&~ {
                ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                ~&233748328658231&~: ~&233745975898428&~.touchLocked
                ~&16248806127106825405&~: ~&214625660372&~
                minimumTouchPoints: 1
                maximumTouchPoints: 10
                touchPoints: [
                    TouchPoint {}, TouchPoint {}, TouchPoint {},
                    TouchPoint {}, TouchPoint {}, TouchPoint {},
                    TouchPoint {}, TouchPoint {}, TouchPoint {},
                    TouchPoint {}
                ]
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE

    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]#[[6504254477]]
        REDEFINE [[214622501183]]
            LOCATE BEFORE {
                ~&3433677163589050091&~ = ~&6504329801&~;
            }
            INSERT {
                ~&233745975898428&~.touchLocked = ~&214625660372&~;
            }
        END REDEFINE
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
